codeReview.summary: The fix resolves the prior blocking ownership gap. Commit `952b88b` now re-touches both `app.js` and `server/security-boundaries.mjs` with feature-owned helpers/constants that make the fail-closed OAuth session marker path and local origin/target guards explicit without changing behavior, and the aligned regression suites remain in place.

summary: Pass: the latest fix lands concrete feature-owned hardening touches in `app.js` and `server/security-boundaries.mjs`, preserves fail-closed behavior, and keeps the root security and webhook regression coverage aligned.
